  parent_authority_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the parent or superior regulatory authority if this authority operates under a hierarchical structure.']
  parent_regulatory_authority_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on regulatory_authority (parent_regulatory_authority_id)']
  age_rating_system varchar [note: 'Name of the age rating or content classification system administered by this authority (e.g., ESRB, PEGI, USK, CERO).']
  audit_frequency varchar [note: 'Standard frequency at which this authority conducts compliance audits of gaming operations.']
  authority_code varchar [note: 'Unique business identifier or abbreviation code for the regulatory authority used in external communications and filings.']
  authority_name varchar [note: 'Official legal name of the regulatory authority or governing body.']
  authority_status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the regulatory authority in its lifecycle.']
  authority_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the regulatory authority by jurisdictional scope and governance level.']
  breach_notification_sla_hours varchar [note: 'Maximum number of hours allowed to notify this authority of a data breach incident.']
  certification_fee_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Standard fee charged by the authority for game certification or age rating review.']
  certification_fee_currency varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO currency code for certification fees charged by this authority.']
  certification_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether games must obtain formal certification or approval from this authority before publication in the jurisdiction.']
  contact_address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the physical mailing address for the regulatory authority headquarters.']
  contact_address_line2 varchar [note: 'Second line of the physical mailing address for the regulatory authority headquarters.']
  contact_city varchar [note: 'City where the regulatory authority headquarters is located.']
  contact_country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code for the regulatory authority headquarters location.']
  contact_email varchar [note: 'Primary email address for official correspondence and compliance inquiries with the regulatory authority.']
  contact_phone varchar [note: 'Primary telephone number for contacting the regulatory authority for compliance matters.']
  contact_postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal or ZIP code for the regulatory authority headquarters address.']
  coppa_applicable boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this authority enforces COPPA requirements for protection of children\'s data in gaming.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this regulatory authority record was first created in the system.']
  data_subject_request_sla_days varchar [note: 'Maximum number of days allowed to respond to data subject access requests under this authority\'s regulations.']
  dissolved_date date [note: 'Date when the regulatory authority was dissolved, merged, or ceased operations. Null if still active.']
  esports_oversight boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this authority has regulatory oversight over esports competitions and leagues.']
  established_date date [note: 'Date when the regulatory authority was officially established or chartered.']
  filing_deadline_days varchar [note: 'Number of days after period end by which compliance filings must be submitted to this authority.']
  gambling_regulation_scope varchar [note: 'Extent to which this authority regulates gambling-like mechanics and real-money gaming activities.']
  gdpr_applicable boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this authority enforces GDPR data protection requirements for gaming operations.']
  jurisdiction_country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code representing the primary country jurisdiction of the regulatory authority.']
  jurisdiction_region varchar [note: 'State, province, or regional subdivision within the country where the authority has jurisdiction.']
  loot_box_disclosure_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this regulatory authority mandates disclosure of loot box probabilities and mechanics.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes, special requirements, or contextual information about this regulatory authority and its compliance expectations.']
  official_website_url varchar [note: 'Primary web address for the regulatory authority\'s official website and public information portal.']
  penalty_enforcement_level varchar [note: 'Relative severity and enforcement rigor of penalties imposed by this authority for non-compliance.']
  primary_contact_name varchar [note: 'Name of the primary liaison or contact person at the regulatory authority for compliance matters.']
  primary_contact_title varchar [note: 'Job title or role of the primary contact person at the regulatory authority.']
  regulatory_domain varchar [note: 'Primary area of regulatory oversight and compliance focus for gaming operations.']
  reporting_frequency varchar [note: 'Standard frequency at which compliance reports must be submitted to this regulatory authority.']
  updated_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who last modified this regulatory authority record.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this regulatory authority record was last modified in the system.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who created this regulatory authority record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for regulatory_authority. Referenced by regulatory_authority_id.'
}

Table compliance.regulatory_directive {
  regulatory_directive_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for regulatory_directive']
  issuing_authority_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_authority. Business justification: Regulatory directives are issued by regulatory authorities. Should FK to the regulatory_authority that issued the directive. Currently has issuing_authority (STRING); should normalize to FK.']
  superseded_by_directive_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the regulatory_directive_id of the newer directive that supersedes this one, if applicable. Null if this directive is still current or has been repealed without replacement.']
  superseded_regulatory_directive_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on regulatory_directive (superseded_regulatory_directive_id)']
  age_verification_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this directive mandates age verification mechanisms for players (True) or not (False), common for COPPA, age-gated content, and gambling-adjacent mechanics.']
  applicability_scope varchar [note: 'Defines which gaming products or platforms are subject to this directive (all games, mobile only, console only, PC only, online multiplayer only, specific genres, or games with specific age ratings).']
  audit_frequency varchar [note: 'Required or recommended frequency for internal compliance audits against this directive (annual, semi-annual, quarterly, monthly, ad-hoc, or continuous monitoring).']
  compliance_deadline date [note: 'Date by which the organization must achieve full compliance with the directive requirements. May differ from effective_date to allow implementation grace period. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.']
  compliance_owner_email varchar [note: 'Corporate email address of the compliance owner for this directive, used for internal coordination and audit inquiries.']
  compliance_owner_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the individual designated as the compliance owner or subject matter expert for this directive within the organization.']
  compliance_priority varchar [note: 'Business priority level assigned to compliance with this directive based on risk exposure, penalty severity, and business impact (critical, high, medium, low).']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current organizational compliance status with this directive (compliant, non-compliant, partially compliant, under remediation, or not yet assessed).']
  content_rating_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this directive mandates obtaining an age/content rating from a classification board (e.g., ESRB, PEGI, USK) before distribution (True) or not (False).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this regulatory directive record was first created in the system. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.']
  data_localization_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this directive mandates that player data must be stored or processed within the jurisdiction\'s borders (True) or not (False).']
  data_subject_rights_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this directive grants specific rights to data subjects (e.g., GDPR right to access, right to erasure, COPPA parental consent) that must be operationalized (True) or not (False).']
  directive_code varchar [note: 'Unique business identifier code for the regulatory directive, used for external reference and reporting (e.g., GDPR-2016-679, COPPA-1998, ESRB-M17).']
  directive_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the regulatory directive, including its purpose, scope, and key requirements for gaming operations.']
  directive_name varchar [note: 'Full official name of the regulatory directive or legal requirement.']
  directive_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the regulatory directive indicating whether it is enforceable, pending implementation, superseded by newer regulation, repealed, under review, or in draft state.']
  directive_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the regulatory directive by its primary regulatory domain (privacy regulation, consumer protection, age rating, loot box disclosure, data localization, content restriction).']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the regulatory directive becomes legally binding and enforceable. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date when the regulatory directive ceases to be enforceable, if applicable. Null for directives with indefinite duration. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.']
  internal_policy_document_url varchar [note: 'Link to the internal compliance policy, procedure document, or knowledge base article that operationalizes this directive within the organization.']
  jurisdiction_code varchar [note: 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 or alpha-3 country or territory code indicating the geographic jurisdiction where this directive applies (e.g., USA, GBR, DEU, JPN, AUS).']
  jurisdiction_level varchar [note: 'Administrative level at which the directive is enforced (international treaty, federal/national law, state/provincial regulation, or municipal ordinance).']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this regulatory directive record was last updated in the system. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date when the organization last conducted a formal review of compliance status against this directive. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.']
  legal_citation varchar [note: 'Official legal citation or reference number for the directive in the issuing jurisdiction\'s legal system (e.g., Regulation (EU) 2016/679, 15 U.S.C. §§ 6501–6506).']
  loot_box_disclosure_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this directive requires disclosure of loot box, gacha, or randomized reward probabilities to players (True) or not (False).']
  maximum_penalty_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Maximum monetary penalty amount that can be imposed for non-compliance, in the currency specified by penalty_currency_code. Null if penalty is non-monetary or not specified.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next formal compliance review or audit against this directive. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional context, implementation notes, exceptions, or special considerations related to this directive.']
  official_url varchar [note: 'Web address linking to the official published text of the regulatory directive on the issuing authority\'s website.']
  penalty_currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the maximum penalty amount (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP, JPY).']
  penalty_severity varchar [note: 'Classification of the enforcement penalty type for non-compliance (criminal prosecution, administrative fine, civil penalty, warning notice, or no specific penalty defined).']
  reporting_frequency varchar [note: 'Frequency at which compliance reports must be submitted to the regulatory authority, if reporting is required (annual, semi-annual, quarterly, monthly, event-driven, or not applicable).']
  reporting_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this directive mandates periodic regulatory reporting to the issuing authority (True) or not (False).']
  responsible_department varchar [note: 'Name of the internal business unit or department responsible for ensuring compliance with this directive (e.g., Legal, Compliance, Privacy Office, Product Management).']
  risk_rating varchar [note: 'Enterprise risk rating assigned to non-compliance with this directive, based on likelihood and impact assessment (critical, high, medium, low, negligible).']

  Note: 'Master reference table for regulatory_directive. Referenced by regulatory_directive_id.'
}

Table compliance.training_module {
  training_module_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for training_module']
  policy_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.policy. Business justification: Training modules are often mandated by internal compliance policies. Should FK to the policy that requires the training. Note: compliance_framework (STRING) is kept as it may describe external framewo']
  prerequisite_training_module_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on training_module (prerequisite_training_module_id)']
  regulatory_directive_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_directive. Business justification: Training modules may be mandated by regulatory directives (e.g., GDPR requires data protection training). Should FK to the regulatory_directive that requires the training.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date when the training module was officially approved for use in compliance training programs.']
  approver varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the compliance officer or legal authority who approved this training module for deployment.']
  assessment_url varchar [note: 'URL or file path to the assessment or quiz component of the training module.']
  author varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the individual or team responsible for creating the training module content.']
  certificate_template_code varchar [note: 'Identifier for the certificate template used to generate completion certificates for this training module.']
  compliance_framework varchar [note: 'Primary regulatory or industry compliance framework that this training module addresses. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: gdpr|coppa|esrb|pegi|ccpa|ccpa|iso_27001|soc2|ferpa|caru|ftc_guidelines — promote to reference product]']
  content_format varchar [note: 'Primary delivery format of the training module content.']
  content_url varchar [note: 'URL or file path to the training module content in the learning management system or content repository.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this training module record was first created in the compliance management system.']
  description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the training module content, learning objectives, and compliance topics covered.']
  duration_minutes varchar [note: 'Expected duration in minutes for an employee to complete the training module.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when this training module version becomes effective and available for assignment to employees.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date when this training module version expires and is no longer valid for compliance purposes. Null for modules without expiration.']
  is_mandatory boolean [note: 'Indicates whether completion of this training module is mandatory for the target audience to maintain compliance.']
  jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code indicating the primary regulatory jurisdiction this training module addresses. Multiple jurisdictions may require separate module instances.']
  language_code varchar [note: 'ISO 639-1 two-letter language code indicating the primary language of the training module content.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date when the training module content was last reviewed for accuracy and regulatory alignment.']
  learning_objectives varchar [note: 'Structured list of learning objectives and competencies that employees will achieve upon successful completion of the training module.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this training module record was last modified or updated.']
  module_code varchar [note: 'Externally-known unique code for the training module used in compliance tracking systems and regulatory reporting.']
  module_type varchar [note: 'Categorical classification of the training module based on the compliance domain it addresses. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: regulatory_compliance|data_privacy|age_rating|loot_box_disclosure|esrb_certification|gdpr_training|coppa_training|pegi_certification|audit_preparation|jurisdictional_reporting — promote to reference product]']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next content review to ensure continued regulatory compliance and content accuracy.']
  passing_score_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Minimum percentage score required to successfully complete the training module and meet compliance requirements.']
  prerequisites varchar [note: 'Description of any prerequisite training modules or knowledge required before taking this module.']
  recertification_interval_months varchar [note: 'Number of months between required recertification completions for this training module. Null if recertification is not required.']
  recertification_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether employees must retake this training module periodically to maintain compliance certification.']
  regulatory_authority varchar [note: 'Name of the regulatory body or governing authority whose requirements this training module addresses (e.g., FTC, ICO, CNIL, ESRB).']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the training module indicating its availability and approval state.']
  tags varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of keywords or tags for categorization and searchability of the training module (e.g., privacy, minors, monetization, disclosure).']
  target_audience varchar [note: 'Intended audience or role group for whom this training module is designed. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: all_employees|developers|publishers|legal_team|customer_support|data_protection_officers|qa_testers|marketing_team — promote to reference product]']
  title varchar [note: 'Human-readable title of the compliance training module.']
  version varchar [note: 'Version number of the training module following semantic versioning to track content updates and regulatory changes.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for training_module. Referenced by training_module_id.'
}
